title: BEM-875 curator request
objective:
Create file governance/audit/mailbox/to_curator/BEM875_PROTOCOL_V13_REQUEST.md with content # BEM-875 PROTOCOL V1.3 REQUEST
Status: SENT_TO_CURATOR
Route: External GPT auditor -> Curator -> internal contour -> Curator -> external mailbox
Objective: agree updated protocol v1.3 based on operator discussion after v1.2.
Required additions:
- Pre-P0 repository cleanup before roadmap execution.
- Worker model: one Curator manages several internal contours.
- Parallel roadmap execution by task IDs and dependencies.
- Isolated workspace for every internal contour.
- Curator-controlled integration lane with tests before merge.
- Architecture control registry: target, actual, delta, remaining work.
- Director to Worker communication via task registry such as GitHub Issues.
- Scalable data exchange between contours through policy-governed channels.
- Time registry as audit log, separate from live communication channel.
- Enterprise customer segment and large-business ERP pilot after P0.
- Product repos: control-plane is factory and architect for client-specific multiagent systems.
Use open-source practice: supervisor/orchestrator, handoffs, stateful workflows, typed outputs, guardrails, tracing, observability, staged autonomy, human approval for high risk.
Required Curator final mailbox: governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator/BEM875_PROTOCOL_V13_RESPONSE.md
Required status: APPROVED_WITH_NOTES or BLOCKED_WITH_REASON.
Required sections: Findings, Evidence, Agreed changes, Strategic options, Recommendation.
No issue comments.
